sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96887" key="stixourgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στῐχουργ-ός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n96887.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">versifier</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Thom.</author> </bibl> Mag.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4049.tlg001:p.189" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.189</biblScope> </bibl> R. (who censures the word).</sense> </entryFree>
